personal.name: Juan Isaac
personal.location: New York City (EST) · Remote worldwide · English / Español
personal.title: AI × Web3 Engineer & Security-minded TPM
personal.bio: I ship ElizaOS/LangGraph agents with on-chain guardrails. Partner with founders and product teams to launch agentic, transaction-capable products that are safe by design—AI tutors with evaluation loops, on-chain payment automation, and wallet UX that works for non-crypto users.

experience.description: Built an AI tutoring platform that rewards students with crypto for mastering academic concepts, increasing engagement and retention. Integrated LangGraph for persistent AI conversations and Coinbase AgentKit for secure, parent-approved crypto payouts. Designed a permission architecture ensuring secure financial transactions aligned with parental controls. Managed full development lifecycle: requirements gathering, architecture design, coding, testing, deployment, and feedback iteration.

Collaborated with Coinbase engineering teams to enhance AgentKit and other blockchain AI tools. Provided technical feedback on early-stage frameworks including LangChain and ElizaOS, improving developer experience and integration potential. Represented platform at developer events, fostering adoption and community engagement.

Developed, fuzz-tested, and deployed secure Solidity smart contracts across multiple EVM-compatible blockchains. Conducted vulnerability assessments and code audits with Secure3 and Code4rena, mitigating critical security risks.

Delivered blockchain-based applications integrating AI-driven automation for decentralized finance and education. Designed APIs and implemented data pipelines for on-chain/off-chain interoperability. Researched and implemented responsible AI practices, ensuring fairness, transparency, and security.

projects.title: AllowMe.ai — AI Study Partner with Safe Payouts
projects.description: Secure AI-powered educational platform helping NYC families prep for charter and Catholic school admissions. Built production-grade agentic system with TutorAgent, Evaluator, and allow-listed payment flows with parental controls.
projects.problem: NYC charter/Catholic school applicants often lack foundational skills. Parents need structured prep and a way to sustain daily study habits with safe, controlled incentives.

solution.architecture: ElizaOS/LangGraph TutorAgent → Evaluator Agent → Allow-listed wallet flows with parental dashboard. Telegram bot integration for accessibility. Built on Supabase with role-based access control.
bullets: TutorAgent generates personalized quizzes and study plans using LangGraph memory
Evaluator agent prevents hallucination-driven rewards with multi-step verification
Allow-listed payout system with parental approval (Coinbase AgentKit roadmap)
Parent dashboard for monitoring progress, study minutes, and spend controls

security: Fuzz testing and invariant checks on payment logic

quote.text: The AI tutor helped my daughter stay consistent with practice. She's more confident going into her admissions tests.

projects.lessons: At scale, we'd implement SLOs for agent response time, cost management per session, and enhanced evaluation models. Future: multi-language support (Spanish), advanced progress analytics, and blockchain-based achievement NFTs.

projects.title: PromptQuest — AI-Generated NFT Platform
projects.description: No-code platform enabling creators to generate and mint AI-powered image and video NFTs. Removes wallet friction with email-based minting via Crossmint on Solana.
projects.problem: Creators, educators, and workshop participants are blocked by wallet onboarding complexity and smart contract deployment barriers when trying to explore AI + Web3.

solution.architecture: Prompt → AI Generation (Hugging Face + Veo 2.0) → IPFS Storage → Crossmint Minting → Email Delivery. Full pipeline automation with retry logic and metadata integrity checks.
bullets: Text-to-image and text-to-video generation using state-of-the-art AI models
IPFS pinning with metadata validation and integrity hashing
Email-based NFT minting (no wallet setup required)
Deployed on Solana testnet with mainnet migration roadmap

security: Fallback paths for failed mints (retry, refund, support)
projects.lessons: Key learnings: managing AI model failures, handling chain congestion, implementing proper gas estimation. Next steps: batch minting dashboard, secondary sales analytics, provenance tracking, and mainnet migration with cost optimization.

projects.title: Windsurf Vibe Competition — 3rd Place Winner
projects.description: Competed in live hackathon pitting AI-assisted developers against traditional developers. Built production-ready web app in under 60 minutes using Next.js and Windsurf AI.
projects.problem: Prove the future of collaborative AI development by building a fully functional web application faster and with better UX than traditional development approaches.

solution.architecture: Next.js + TypeScript scaffold → Windsurf AI real-time code generation → TailwindCSS styling → Vercel deployment. Leveraged AI pair programming for rapid component iteration.
bullets: Built responsive competition landing page with signup flow
AI-generated UI components with real-time iteration
Deployed end-to-end on Vercel in under 45 minutes
Demonstrated 70% faster development cycle vs traditional coding

metrics.judge_scores: High marks in Creativity & UX categories

quote.text: Congratulations on securing the 3rd place position! This is a fantastic achievement, and we are all incredibly proud of your accomplishment.

projects.lessons: Proved that AI-assisted development can match or exceed traditional workflows in speed and creativity when combined with strong architecture understanding. Future applications: rapid prototyping, design-to-code workflows, and AI-native development patterns.

projects.title: createPersona.ai — Voice-first AI Personalization
projects.description: Voice-first AI personalization platform — describe yourself once, get custom instructions for ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok. Live at createpersona.xyz.
projects.problem: AI users struggle to get consistent, personalized responses across different platforms. Manually crafting detailed prompts for each AI service is time-consuming and inconsistent.

solution.architecture: Voice input → AI processing → Multi-platform instruction generation → Custom prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Grok. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and modern AI APIs.
bullets: Voice-first input for natural self-description
AI-powered analysis of personality and communication preferences
Custom instruction generation for multiple AI platforms
Cross-platform consistency in AI interactions
Real-time prompt optimization and refinement

security: Voice data encryption and secure processing
Privacy-focused data handling with minimal retention
Secure API integrations with major AI platforms
User consent management and data portability
Regular security audits and penetration testing

quote.text: Finally, my AI assistants understand me the same way across all platforms. This is a game-changer for my productivity.

projects.lessons: Voice-first UX reduces friction significantly. Cross-platform AI personalization is the future - users want consistent AI experiences regardless of the tool they're using.

projects.title: StableShield — Trustless Wallet Security Agent
projects.description: Trustless wallet security agent on Base — scans, scores, and revokes dangerous ERC-20 approvals across 6 chains. Live at stableshield.work with 348 tests passing.
projects.problem: Crypto users face constant security risks from malicious ERC-20 token approvals. Existing solutions are centralized, require trust, or lack comprehensive cross-chain coverage.

solution.architecture: Multi-chain scanning → Risk scoring algorithm → Automated revocation system → Real-time monitoring dashboard. Built on Base with comprehensive test coverage.
bullets: Scans ERC-20 approvals across 6 major blockchains
Proprietary risk scoring algorithm for approval assessment
Automated revocation of dangerous approvals
Real-time monitoring and alerting system
Trustless operation with on-chain verification

security: Formal verification of critical security components
Regular security audits by Code4rena and Secure3

quote.text: StableShield caught three dangerous approvals I didn't even know I had. This is essential security infrastructure for any crypto user.

projects.lessons: Trustless security solutions are critical for Web3 adoption. Comprehensive test coverage (348 tests) is key to production security. Multi-chain support is non-negotiable in today's ecosystem.

internship.workStyle: End-to-end ownership from architecture to production. Security-minded, fast iteration, and clear communication with both technical and business stakeholders.
internship.goals: Partner with founders and product teams to launch agentic, transaction-capable products that are safe by design—AI tutors with evaluation loops, on-chain payment automation, and wallet UX that works for non-crypto users. Open to advisory retainers, short build sprints, and select founder roles where security and measurable outcomes matter.

funFacts: AllowMe.ai: Designed TutorAgent → Evaluator flow with allow-listed payouts; GOAT wallet integration; zero unauthorized transfers
PromptQuest: Prompt → IPFS → Crossmint email minting (Solana testnet); workshop-ready UX
Windsurf Vibe Competition (Top-3): Built and deployed Next.js app in <45 minutes
Secure3 Certified Auditor: 2 First Place wins, 5 valid submissions (3 High, 3 Medium), 2 solo High findings across Mantle V2, zkLink Nova, Aki V3
Security DNA: Solidity + Foundry/Hardhat, fuzz/invariant tests, role-based guardrails. Active on Code4rena & Sherlock
Ecosystem leadership: Ambassador/educator; bilingual (EN/ES); hands-on workshops for ElizaOS/Crossmint
personality.workingStyle: End-to-end ownership from architecture to production. I bring both technical depth (ElizaOS agents, smart contract security) and product thinking (UX that works for non-crypto users, evaluation loops that prevent hallucination-driven payouts).
personality.motivation: Build agentic, transaction-capable products that are safe by design. Ship AI tutors with evaluation loops, on-chain payment automation, and wallet UX for mainstream users.
